title: NIPER Hajipur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Civil Engineer, Accounts Officer and More Posts
organization: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Hajipur (NIPER Hajipur )
post_name: Senior Scientist, Accounts Officer, Junior Civil Engineer / CAD Designer annd More Posts
short_info: The National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Hajipur (NIPER Hajipur) has officially announced the Centre of Excellence (CoE) in Biological Therapeutics Recruitment 2026 with 8 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advertisement No. NIPER-HJP/CoE/Recruitment/2026/01 on the official NIPER Hajipur website. Candidates who meet the prescribed age criteria of 30 to 55 years (depending on the post) and hold qualifications ranging from Bachelor's Degree, Master's Degree, MBA, B.Tech, CA (Inter)/CWA (Inter), to PhD with relevant experience can now submit their appli

age_limit.age_details: Maximum age limits vary by post, from 30 to 55 years.
age_limit.details: Chief Executive Officer (CEO): Maximum 50 years Business Development Officer/ Project Manager: Maximum 40 years Senior Scientist: Maximum 45 years Scientist / Post-Doctoral Fellow (PDF): Maximum 40 years Technician/ Project Assistant: Maximum 30 years Administrative Assistant: Maximum 35 years Accounts Officer: Maximum 55 years Junior Civil Engineer / CAD Designer: Maximum 35 years

qualification.education_qualification: Qualifications range from Bachelor's degree to PhD, with specific experience requirements for each post.
qualification.details: Chief Executive Officer (CEO): PhD in Biological/ Pharmacological Sciences with a minimum of 10 years of progressive industrial experience in the biopharmaceutical sector. Business Development Officer/ Project Manager: MBA degree in business, marketing, or a related field with a minimum of 5 years of experience in business development, sales, licensing within the pharmaceutical, biotech, CDMO industry involving biologics/biosimilars or allied products. OR Master's degree in any branch of life Sciences with at least 5 years of experience in the above-mentioned areas. Senior Scientist: PhD in Biological Science / Biotechnology/ Life Science/ Pharmacological Sciences with a minimum of 5 years of post-PhD experience in reputed national/international laboratories and/or relevant industry experience in biological therapeutics and product development. Scientist / Post-Doctoral Fellow (PDF): PhD in Biological Science/Life Science/Biotechnology/ Pharmacological Sciences with 0 to 3 years of post-PhD experience. PhD thesis submitted candidates will also be considered upon recommendation from their PhD thesis supervisors. Technician/ Project Assistant: Master's degree in Biological Science/Life Science/Biotechnology/ Pharmacological Sciences from a recognized University/Institute. Administrative Assistant: Bachelor's degree in any discipline from a recognized University/Institute. Minimum 2 years of experience in office administration, file management, note sheet drafting, and handling official email correspondence. Accounts Officer: Bachelor's/ Master's in commerce, having a professional degree of CA (Inter)/CWA (Inter). Minimum 5 years of experience in accounts, budgeting, audit, and financial management. Junior Civil Engineer / CAD Designer: B. Tech in Civil Engineering / relevant specialization from a recognized University/Institute with minimum 1 year of experience in civil works and building drawings.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIPER Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIPER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NIPER Recruitment 2026 is 18th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NIPER Hajipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies announced for the Centre of Excellence (CoE) in Biological Therapeutics posts at NIPER Hajipur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NIPER Hajipur jobs?
faq.answer: Applications for NIPER Hajipur recruitment are to be submitted via email only. No hard copies will be accepted.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the Technician/ Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Technician/ Project Assistant post is a Master's degree in Biological Science/ Life Science/ Biotechnology/ Pharmacological Sciences.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Accounts Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Accounts Officer position is 55 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary range for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The salaries for the advertised posts range from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 1,25,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NIPER Hajipur recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview, which can be conducted either physically or online.

faq.question: Q8. Does NIPER Hajipur offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any such information.

faq.question: Q9. What documents need to be sent along with the application?
faq.answer: Self-attested copies of Date of Birth Certificate, Educational qualification certificates, Experience certificates, and List of publications/patents (if any) must be sent by email.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for NIPER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, labeled as 'Official Notification PDF'.
